ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the event is held */,
  "article" TEXT /* Link to the article or preview of the event */,
  "match_day" INTEGER /* Match day of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the event */,
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the venue was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_events" (
  "team_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-event pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the official */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the official */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the official was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_officials" (
  "event_official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-official pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "event_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "event_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-tag pair */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the event tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification sent to the user */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
